title: Intent Snapshot
description: Structured summary of a mission's current intent interpretation at a lifecycle transition. Used to detect intent drift between stages.

stage.description: Intent-loop stage at snapshot time: receive | clarify | preserve | execute | verify | learn. Kyberion mission stages (intake / classification / ... / retrospective) map onto these.

goal.description: One-line statement of the outcome the mission aims to achieve.

deliverables.description: Artifacts or decisions the mission must produce.

stakeholders.description: Person slugs whose approval / alignment the mission depends on.

trace_ref.description: Optional pointer to the upstream snapshot or user prompt this snapshot derives from.
